titleStmt.title: SII 11.37: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 37. (B.K. No. 126 of 1926-27). KURTAKŌṬI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE VĪRABHADRA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Akālavarsha Kannaradēva (i.e., Kṛishṇa III), and registers gifts of land made to the temples of Mūlasthānadēva and Ādityadēva of Kuṟitakūṇṭe by Lōkayya while Nanniya-Gaṅga Būtuga (II) was governing the Beḷvola Three Hundred and Purigeṟe Three Hundred provinces. The epigraph is dated Śaka 868, Parābhava, Kārttika, śu. 5, Sunday. The tithi quoted fell, according to L.D.S.Pillai's Ephemeris, on Saturday, 3rd October, A.D. 946. We have seen above (No. 36) that this Gaṅga prince was ruling over the two provinces in A.D. 942.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastya kāḷavarṣa śrīpṛthvīva
llabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramē
śvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ śrīmatka
nnaradēvana rājya muttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhige saluttire nanniya gaṅgaṁ
būtayyaṁ purigeṟe mūnūṟuṁ beḷvolamū
nūṟuma nāḷuttire . śakavarṣa meṇṭunūṟaṟuva
tteṇṭaneya parābhava saṁvatsaraṁ tadvarṣābhyantara
kārttika suddha pañcamiyu mādityavāradaṁdu kuṟi
takūṇṭeya mūlasthānada dēvargge lōkayyaṁ tana
ge gāvuṇḍu mi mēkabhōgamāgi yāḷuttiḻdu
vana bhujaṅgabhaṭārara kālaṁ kaḻci koṭṭa keyma
ttar 12 Ādityadēvargge matta 12 mane 2 Anti
rppatti nālku mattargge
damaged
maṅgaḷaṁ
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthi
vēndrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 11.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
